headline: $1B Gaming Firms Seek Congressional Sports Bet Ban

article.title: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
article.summary: Gambling industry groups want the US Senate to step in to clarify that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission does not have the authority to oversee prediction markets.

headline: Oil Drops 3% on Hormuz Supply Accord

article.title: Crude Oil Retreats as Hormuz Agreement Lifts Outlook for Supply
article.summary: Oil fell as an interim US-Iran peace deal went into effect, putting the focus on whether transits through the Strait of Hormuz will be ramped up as Persian Gulf producers restart shut-in fields.

headline: Asics Splits Off Onitsuka Tiger in $1.2B Move

article.title: OT GROUP CEO on Onitsuka Tiger Spinning off from Asics
article.summary: Onitsuka Tiger is looking to bring its mark as an independent brand, separate from Asics. OT GROUP President and CEO Ryoji Shoda sat down for an interview with Bloomberg News' Shery Ahn in Tokyo to explain his vision for the brand going forward. (Source: Bloomberg)

Fed Signals Possible Rate Hikes as Kevin Warsh Opens ‘New Chapter’ at Central Bank
